name: Marmoleum Sheet Striato 2.5mm (linoleum)
notes: GWP-fossil 4.36, GWP-total -1.24 (carbon negative due to biogenic uptake -5.60). Weight 2.9 kg/m2. No CO2 certificates used.

name: Marmoleum Sheet 2.5mm (plain/marbled linoleum)
notes: Similar GWP profile to Striato variant. Bio-based linoleum (linseed oil, wood flour, jute backing). Carbon negative A1-A3.

name: Marmoleum Decibel 3.5mm (acoustic linoleum)
notes: Thicker variant (3.5mm) with acoustic backing. Higher GWP than 2.5mm due to additional material. Estimated from 2024 EPD.

name: Swedoor ADVANCE-LINE Interior 40mm unglazed Unique
notes: Declared unit 1 m2. Mass 14.9 kg/m2. Reference door 0.825x2.040m = 1.683 m2. Per door: GWP-fossil ~54.3 kg, GWP-total ~17.7 kg. Bio-based 90%. Valid until 2029-03-07.

name: Swedoor ADVANCE-LINE Exterior 92.3mm unglazed ECO
notes: Exterior door 92.3mm. Declared unit 1 m2. Reference door 0.925x2.033m = 1.881 m2. Per door: ~98.8 kg CO2e. Heavier than interior variant.

name: Swedoor ADVANCE-LINE Interior glazed/stable doors
notes: Interior glazed and stable doors. Estimated GWP from EPD published 2024-01-05, valid until 2029-01-05.
